posts.text:
BREAKING: March PCE inflation, the Fed's preferred inflation measure, rises to 3.5%, the highest since August 2023.

Core PCE inflation rises to 3.2%, the highest since November 2023.

In the first month of the Iran War, US inflation hit a 3-year high.

April's data will be interesting.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
All the world’s major paint companies will soon use turbostratic fractal graphene for max performance.   It’s a drop in master batch solution.  Easy peezy.  Will also really help get hydrograph known globally.  The accelerator is being pressed.  

Extremely exciting times…
